description: Fashionable sandals for men from lotto, fusing the sturdy floater-style sandals with carefree flip flops. Wear this for casual occasions with denims or cargoes Upper Fabric upper with thong style straps and criss-cross ankle straps to lock the foot in place Soft plastic toe separator for comfort and durability Fabric adjustable ankle straps Padded rubber footbed with stitch detailing and textured grooves for instep comfort Outsole TPU outsole with multidirectional lugs for grip and traction Branding on the heel Sandal care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
